title: RNA extration for the R. crenulata genome

steps: Incubate a centrifuge tube with 1.5ml of pBIOZOL : CTAB (1:1) at 65°C in the Thermomixer. undetermined Volume of the tube: 2ml
Transfer 400 µl of Chloroform : Isoamylol (24: 1) in a new centrifuge tube. undetermined Volume of the tube: 2ml
Transfer two pieces of the mixture of 700 µl of water-saturated Phenol and 200 µl of Chloroform : Isoamylol (24: 1) in two new centrifuge tubes, respectively. Volume of the tube: 2ml
Transfer 850µl of Chloroform : Isoamylol (24: 1) in a new centrifuge tube. Volume of the tube: 2ml
Transfer 700 µl of Isopropanol in a new centrifuge tube. Volume of the tube: 1.5ml
Add the sample tissue to a pre-cooling mortar and grind tissue into powder under the liquid nitrogen with a pre-cooling pestle.
Transfer the powder in the tube prepared in step1, after mixing, incubate the tube for 15min at 65°C. 00:15:00
Cool the centrifuge tube to room temperature and centrifuge it at 12,000rpm for 5min at 4°C. 00:05:00
Transfer the supernatant in the tube prepared in step2 and shake strongly for 10-20s to mix. 00:00:20
Centrifuge the tube at 12,000rpm for 10min at 4°C. 00:10:00
Transfer and divide the supernatant equally into two tubes prepared in step3, and then shake strongly for 10-20s to mix, respectively. 00:00:20
Centrifuge the tube at 12,000rpm for 10min at 4°C.
Transfer and mix the supernatant from two tubes, and then add it to the tube prepared in step 4. Shake strongly for 10-20s to mix completely. 00:00:20
Centrifuge the tube at 12,000rpm for 10min at 4°C. 00:10:00
Transfer the supernatant in the tube prepared in step 5 and mix them by gently inverting.
Incubate the tube at -20°C for 2hours. 02:00:00
Centrifuge at 13,600rpm for 20min at 4°C and remove the supernatant. 00:20:00
Add 1ml of 75% of ethanol, flick the tube to resuspend the pellet, wash the RNA pellet for 3min. (wash 1/2) 00:03:00
Centrifuge at 13,600rpm for 3min at 4°C, discard the liquid. (wash 1/2) 00:03:00
Add 1ml of 75% of ethanol, flick the tube to resuspend the pellet, wash the RNA pellet for 3min. (wash 2/2) 00:03:00
Centrifuge at 13,600rpm for 3min at 4°C, discard the liquid. (wash 2/2) 00:03:00
Air dry the pellet for 3-5min at room temperature. 00:05:00
Add 50 µl of DEPC to dissolve the pellet. undetermined
